Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Continued To Aug-31-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Ray Sherman, Jr., Esq. for Plaintiff: Richard Banks, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Clyde Nathan Smith and Terry Murphy as follows:
Damages $60,000.00
PreJudgment Interest $18,144.00
Attorney's Fees $7,200.00
Costs $1,468.00, for a total of $86,812.00
Counsel to prepard Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.
